project_path.description: Absolute path to the Unity project root. Required.

code.description: C# code to compile and execute in Unity Editor. Written as the body of a static method. Use print(obj) or printJson(obj) to return results.

editor_status.description: The canonical Unity Editor status from the Environment section's `Unity Editor Status`. Allowed values: `disconnected`, `editing`, `playing`, `playing_paused`. You MUST read the current status and pass it exactly. `playing_paused` still counts as Play Mode for write-safety decisions. The call will be rejected if this does not match the actual Editor state.
